entries.title: UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
ADR-004: Non-Blocking Knowledge Queries with 5s Timeout
ADR-002 correction: prune pass and heal pass are also unconditional since bugfix-444 (supersedes #3559, #178)
Status-transition handlers must conditionally re-insert into VectorIndex when restoring an entry
